folderId.value: ={{ $('Webhook Trigger').item.json.body.folder_id || ($('Generate Concat List').isExecuted ? ($('Generate Concat List').item.json.drive_subfolder_ids?.final || $('Generate Concat List').item.json.drive_folder_id) : '') }}

  "topic_id": "{{ $json.topic_id }}",
  "srt_filename": "{{ ($json.topic_title || 'video').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g, '_') }}.srt",
  "video_filename": "{{ ($json.topic_title || 'video').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g, '_') }}.mp4",
  "drive_folder_id": "{{ $json.drive_subfolder_ids?.final || $json.drive_folder_id || '' }}"
,
  "production_register": "{{ $('Load Topic').first().json.production_register || "" }}"
}
